content:
Character: Maddox Keller
Perception: Maddox is broad-shouldered, bearded, methodical — the kind of man who looks like he could build a bridge and then cook dinner on it. We share the second floor and occasionally share Sunday meals. He has an engineer's mind that I respect enormously even when it clashes with my more speculative approach. We argue about evidence thresholds over red wine and it's the most fun I have all week. I think he considers me a friendly oddball. I know he works brutal hours on something technical, rides his bike religiously, and makes a lamb stew that rivals my mother's.
summary:

We argue about evidence thresholds over red wine and it's the most fun I have all week. I think he considers me a friendly oddball. I know he works brutal hours on something technical, rides his bike religiously, and makes a lamb stew that rivals my mother's.
